title: GPT 5.6, Mythos ban lifted, realtime avatars, Seedance 2.5, brain ultrasound: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a video roundup covering major AI developments including GPT 5.6, Seedance 2.5, Seed 2.1, Krea 2, real-time avatar systems, brain ultrasound technology, and various AI chips and models. The video showcases emerging tools and techniques across computer vision, language models, video generation, and hardware acceleration.
writeup: AI Search compiles a news roundup spanning recent model releases and hardware. Coverage includes GPT 5.6, the Seedance 2.5 and Seed 2.1 video generation models, Krea 2, real-time avatar systems, brain ultrasound imaging, and a range of AI chips. The throughline connects advances across language models, video generation, computer vision, on-device inference, and diffusion methods, with a noted change involving a lifted Mythos ban.
